subtitle: Agra Fort to the Deccan, 1666 CE

panels.action: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj stands in a shadowed corridor of Agra Fort, regal yet simple in cotton robes and turban, hand lightly touching the hilt of his sword at his side, eyes calm but sharp, behind him faint silhouettes of Mughal guards at a distance and the looming red sandstone walls.

Inside a richly decorated chamber in Agra Fort, Shivaji sits on a simple carpet away from grand cushions, looking small among towering Mughal pillars, his face composed but thoughtful as a heavy wooden door with guards visible through its lattice hints at his confinement.

dialogue.text: Shivaji is kept under watch after a tense visit.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: Chains can’t hold a quiet mind.

panels.action: Close-up on Shivaji’s determined face in dim lamplight as he pretends to be unwell, his eyelids lowered, but one eye slightly open and sharp, watching shadows of guards moving outside the doorway.

dialogue.text: He waits, watching every routine, every guard’s step.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: No haste. The right moment will come.

panels.action: From behind Shivaji’s shoulder we see the open doorway and a small group of attendants bringing covered trays and baskets, while further out, bored Mughal guards lean against the wall; Shivaji’s hand rests lightly on a rolled map and a small palm-leaf note near him, hinting at quiet planning.

dialogue.text: Tradition remembers secret plans and hidden baskets.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: Let the world think I sleep. My mind travels home.

panels.shot: bird's-eye of fort courtyard at dusk
panels.action: A bird’s-eye view of Agra Fort’s inner courtyard at dusk, with long shadows; tiny figure of Shivaji in simple traveller’s clothes moves with attendants carrying large covered hampers toward a gate, while outer walls show watchtowers and distant city roofs.

dialogue.text: After weeks of patience, the path is quietly tested.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: Step small, heart steady. No one must suspect.

panels.shot: wide night shot on road leaving Agra
panels.action: Under a starry night sky outside the city, Shivaji rides a sturdy horse in plain traveller’s attire, face half-wrapped in a cloth, flanked by a tiny escort blurred as silhouettes, moving swiftly along a dusty road with distant outline of Agra fading behind them.

dialogue.text: Beyond Agra, he slips into the night roads.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: The Deccan waits. Our people must know I live.

panels.shot: wide shot of Deccan hill-fort at sunrise
panels.action: At sunrise, Shivaji stands safely on the ramparts of a rocky Deccan hill-fort, now in his familiar Maratha dress and turban, looking out over misty valleys and villages below, his posture relaxed but resolute as rays of light break through clouds behind him.

dialogue.text: From Agra’s walls to Deccan’s hills, patience carried him home.

dialogue.speaker: chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj
dialogue.text: We fight not only with swords, but with steady minds.
Courage is sometimes the calm intelligence to wait, plan, and act at the right moment.
